response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video and identified it as a 5th-anniversary concert for Hololive Indonesia, featuring the song 'CHROMATIC FUTURE'.
2. Identified Scene 1 as an intro (00:00-01:50) and Scene 2 as the vocal performance (01:50-05:05).
3. Attempted to search for official lyrics using the song title and composer/artist, but 'CHROMATIC FUTURE' refers to the concert name and not a single recorded song with official lyrics available online.
4. Transcribed the essential spoken/message lyrics from the on-screen display to fulfill the requirements, acknowledging that a full, official lyric source for this live medley does not exist publicly.
response.global_summary: A special 5th-anniversary live performance by Hololive Indonesia, featuring a performance of 'CHROMATIC FUTURE' (a medley created for the concert) by all Indonesian talents.

scenes.description: Introductory sequence featuring the logo and concert title 'CHROMATIC FUTURE - hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE'. No vocal music is playing.
Performance of the song 'CHROMATIC FUTURE' by Hololive Indonesia talents. The performance includes Japanese and Indonesian lyrics displayed on the screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive Indonesia Talents (Ayunda Risu, Kureiji Ollie, Vestia Zeta, Moona Hoshinova, Anya Melfissa, Kaela Kovalskia, Airani Iofifteen, Pavolia Reine, Kobo Kanaeru)
